Title: Bounty Issued
Bounty Contract
Desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A legal bounty has been issued for ~mission(TargetName). ~mission(elite)This contract has been authorized to allow lethal force. ~mission(rush)

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

WANTED: ~mission(TargetName)
A legal bounty has been issued for the above mentioned for violation of Imperial law. ~mission(elite)~mission(rush)

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

You are hereby authorized to track and subdue ~mission(TargetName). ~mission(elite)~mission(rush)

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We have a sworn bounty contract for ~mission(TargetName). You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to subdue the target. ~mission(elite)~mission(rush)

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Destination: the Terra Mills outpost on Cellin
the Rayari, Inc. outpost on Yela
Location: We have a potential last known location for the target.
We will provide data that might indicate where ~mission(TargetName|Last) is hiding.
Our sources have provided the target's last known whereabouts.
